default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss opportunities for collaboration around using AI/LLMs for go-to-market automation and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both Mark and Marcel see huge potential in using AI/LLMs to automate and streamline go-to-market processes like content creation, sales enablement, customer support, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Marcel has built out extensive AI workflows for content generation that are getting impressive results for customers](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Mark is focused on "go-to-market engineering" - applying an engineering mindset to go-to-market automation and processes](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [They plan to explore potential collaboration, with Mark connecting Marcel to his network of technical AI/LLM experts](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's AI Content Workflows

  - [Marcel has built sophisticated AI workflows for programmatic content generation adapted to each customer's voice, brand, product, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Workflows handle research, outlining, writing, optimization for target keywords/audiences](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - Getting impressive results like ranking \#1 for high-value keywords in just a few weeks
  - [Scaling up an agency called Growth Acts to offer these AI content workflows as a service](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)

### Mark's "Go-to-Market Engineering" Vision

  - [Mark is pioneering a new role/approach he calls "go-to-market engineering"](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Applying software engineering principles to go-to-market processes - automation, metrics, systems thinking](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [At his startup Gable, building out thought leadership, sales enablement, and "special ops" workflows](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Sees huge opportunity but lack of people with this hybrid technical/go-to-market skillset](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Potential Collaboration

  - [Mark will introduce Marcel to his network of technical AI experts to explore integrations](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Potential use case: automating LinkedIn post creation from existing blog content](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=2160.0)
  - [Longer-term vision: an "AI-led growth" community bringing together this emerging skillset](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to introduce Marcel to Jeremy (Naus.ai), Jasmine (AI researcher), and Juppson Taylor (generating AI systems)](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=2189.0)
  - [Set up deeper discovery call to identify initial use case to collaborate on](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
  - [Explore building an "AI-led growth" community around this emerging space](https://fathom.video/share/y3Q2AgCXi2-V8rsyJzdFckCiPDSrW4op?tab=summary&timestamp=2234.0)

action_items.description: Introduce Marcel to Jeremy at Nause AI to discuss potential partnership and have discovery call to explore use cases and next steps
Introduce Marcel to Jasmine to discuss potential enterprise solutions
Have a follow-up call to discuss building out AI let growth.com community together
